verification.note: Reported by the TLDNN (Qu, Lu, Zeng, Wang, Wang, 'Enhancing Automatic Modulation Recognition through Robust Global Feature Extraction', IEEE TVT 2024, arXiv:2401.01056) authors, NOT reproduced or re-run by this repo. The 0.6332 is the paper's FULL-SNR-RANGE average accuracy_overall on RadioML 2018.01a (24-class, -20..+30 dB) (verbatim from its results table, NOT a high-SNR peak). Same dataset + same full-SNR-range accuracy_overall metric as our canonical split, which is why it is 'from_paper' (same precedent as the existing tldnn_paper/iqfm_paper rows). The paper uses a 60/20/20 train/val/test ratio (ours is 80/10/10) and does not publish sample indices, so byte-level overlap with our split is not confirmed -- only the dataset + protocol match. Literature reference point, never conflated with an in-repo reproduced number. DISTINCT from the on-board tldnn_paper.json (2016.10a, 0.6283); this is its 2018.01a figure (Table II, plain TLDNN, excluding the +SS variant). Second to MoEformer on 2018.
